author: PortablePorcelain
code: q='5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ==5 5 ==??5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ========  5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ==5 5 ==??5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ========  < < XX< < RR< < MM< < II< < IILL< < XX< < RR< < MM< < IIIIIIII  5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ==5 5 ==??5 5 JJ5 5 FF5 5 AA5 5 ========  ',s=((t/540)%q.length),b=(q.charCodeAt(s)-32)*(t/8),tanb=tan(b*Math.PI/512)*64-128,sinb=sin(b*Math.PI/64)*64-128,(tanb|sinb)-sinb
